stories.title: Show project name in /briefing header
stories.description: Add project.name as a subtitle under the Daily Briefing heading so users always know which project context they are in.

acceptance_criteria.description: Project name visible in briefing header
acceptance_criteria.measurement: DOM query — header region contains text node matching project name

acceptance_criteria.description: Project name renders below Daily Briefing title as smaller text
acceptance_criteria.measurement: DOM structure — project name element follows heading, uses text-sm

acceptance_criteria.description: Long project names do not break layout
acceptance_criteria.measurement: Header container shows no horizontal overflow at 40+ char names

root_cause.what_went_wrong: Spec AC-DB-1 said 'project-specific briefing sections' but did not explicitly call out displaying the project name in the header.

stories.title: Increase stepper +/- button touch targets to 44px
stories.description: Change stepper button classes from w-7 h-7 (~28px) to w-11 h-11 (44px) to meet WCAG 2.5.5 minimum touch target size.

acceptance_criteria.description: Stepper buttons have computed width and height >= 44px
acceptance_criteria.measurement: DOM query — computedStyle width/height >= 44px or w-11 h-11 classes present

acceptance_criteria.description: Stepper layout remains balanced after size increase
acceptance_criteria.measurement: Stepper container has no horizontal overflow; all elements aligned on single row
Numeric value changes by 1 on each tap
Buttons retain aria-label and focus-visible ring

out_of_scope: All other elements in preferences panel

root_cause.what_went_wrong: Builder set w-7 h-7 (~28px) on stepper buttons. WCAG 2.5.5 requires 44px minimum. Known standard not applied.

stories.title: Replace with next/image in photo components
stories.description: Two photo-rendering components use raw tags instead of next/image, causing LCP performance risk with large construction photos. Replace with next/image using fill prop and add Supabase storage domain to next.config.ts remotePatterns.

acceptance_criteria.measurement: DOM query — photo grid contains elements with srcset attribute (next/image adds srcset)
DOM query — photo thumbnails within [data-testid='photo-thumb'] contain with srcset attribute

acceptance_criteria.description: Supabase storage domain configured in remotePatterns
acceptance_criteria.measurement: Code review — next.config.ts contains images.remotePatterns with supabase hostname pattern

acceptance_criteria.description: Photo thumbnails retain aspect-square object-cover styling
acceptance_criteria.measurement: DOM query — next/image wrapper or img element has aspect-square and object-cover classes

acceptance_criteria.description: No ESLint @next/next/no-img-element warnings in photo files
acceptance_criteria.measurement: ESLint output — 0 no-img-element warnings in photos/page.tsx and TaskPhotosManager.tsx

in_scope: app/(app)/photos/page.tsx — replace with next/image Image component
components/photos/TaskPhotosManager.tsx — replace with next/image Image component
next.config.ts — add images.remotePatterns for Supabase storage domain

root_cause.what_went_wrong: Builder used raw for photo thumbnails. next/image requires remotePatterns config for Supabase signed URLs, which may have been the blocker. The builder defaulted to without configuring the optimization pipeline.

stories.title: Add server-side MIME and size validation to uploadPhoto
stories.description: The uploadPhoto server action does not validate file type or size before uploading to Supabase Storage. Import and call the existing validatePhotoFile function server-side before storage upload.

acceptance_criteria.description: Server action validates MIME type before upload
acceptance_criteria.measurement: Unit test — uploadPhoto rejects unsupported MIME types with specific error; no storage upload attempted

acceptance_criteria.description: Server action validates file size before upload
acceptance_criteria.measurement: Unit test — uploadPhoto rejects files > 10 MB with specific error; no storage upload attempted
Integration test — uploadPhoto with valid JPEG under 10 MB proceeds to storage upload and returns { ok: true }

in_scope: app/actions/photos.ts — add validatePhotoFile call before supabase.storage.upload()
out_of_scope: validatePhotoFile function itself (already correct and tested)

root_cause.what_went_wrong: validatePhotoFile exists and is called client-side, but was not added to the server action. Supabase bucket policy provides real enforcement, which may have given false confidence that server validation was covered.
